perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a fair-skinned forearm showing several horizontal red pressure marks. (2) The scene shifts to a point-of-view perspective of a person carrying a white and green Olive Young shopping bag featuring Hello Kitty. (3) The camera shows two shopping bags hanging from the crook of an arm, demonstrating the weight causing the marks. (4) A rapid sequence of shots follows, showing various colorful canned drinks on shelves in a store. (5) A young woman with long dark hair appears, first indoors holding a red cup to her face with a pout, then outdoors at night smiling and holding multiple shopping bags.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic dance music begins immediately with a repetitive rhythmic vocal hook saying 'Um-pa, um-pa'. (2) The music continues at a constant volume and pace, synchronized with visual cuts between different products and scenes. (3) No ambient environmental sounds or spoken dialogue are detected throughout the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'POV: Reasons why people often get scars while traveling in Korea' centered at the top. (2) Decorative Text: '女生請注意！' (Girls please pay attention!) in a yellow box with a caution emoji. (3) Functional Text: '也沒有治療方法' (And there is no cure) appears at the bottom with a smiling face with sweat emoji.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro showing 'injury' -> Cause demonstration (shopping bags) -> Product montage -> Outro with creator

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing both as a POV arm and in front of the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white short-sleeved t-shirt and a dark skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Shelves of a retail store (Olive Young), a convenience store drink refrigerator, and a city street at night with blurry lights.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor retail lighting followed by dim outdoor night lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously highlight the 'occupational hazard' of being a tourist in South Korea: carrying heavy shopping bags from popular stores like Olive Young, which results in temporary red pressure marks on the arms that the creator jokingly refers to as 'scars' with no cure except more shopping.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on the personal experience of shopping rather than promoting a specific product's benefits, though many brands are visible.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'POV' hook combined with relatable 'shopping haul' physical side effects.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video taps into the 'K-beauty' and 'Korean shopping' trend popular on social media, using a trending audio track to maintain high energy.
